title: alyssum aurantiacum
intro: Alyssum aurantiacum, also known as orange alyssum or golden alyssum, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae, characterized by its small, bright yellow or orange flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Alyssum aurantiacum include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
